subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him whose name was mentioned in the Most Great Prison before the face of the Wronged One, Who hath accepted tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر اسمه فی السجن الاعظم امام وجه المظلوم الذی قبل البلایا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
